CustomField.description: Select Fixed to enter a Deposit Due Date, or Relative for the system to auto-populate the Deposit Due Date based on the Contractual Delivery Date plus the value entered in Relative Due Day field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select Fixed to enter a Deposit Due Date, or Relative for the system to auto-populate the Deposit Due Date based on the Contractual Delivery Date plus the value entered in Relative Due Day field.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2203_Deposit Due Date Type
